hero.description: Step into Tycoon — the Web3 twist on the classic game of strategy, ownership, and fortune. Play solo against AI, compete in multiplayer rooms, collect tokens, complete quests, and become the ultimate blockchain tycoon.

success.title: Join successful
success.redirect: Redirecting to the waiting room for code {{code}}…

validation.code_length: Room code must be exactly 6 characters
validation.code_format: Room code must be letters and numbers only

errors.rate_limit: Please wait a moment before trying again.
errors.unauthorized: Please sign in to join a room.
errors.not_found: Room not found. Check the code and try again.
errors.room_full: Room is full. Try a different room.
errors.invite_expired: This invite link has expired. Ask the host for a new one.
errors.server_error: Server error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.network_error: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
errors.timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
